title: MCP Server Capability Descriptor
description: Describes the capabilities advertised by a conforming MCP server in the National MCP-PAI Oncology Trials network, including the server name, version, supported tools, and conformance level.

server_name.description: Unique identifier for the MCP server (e.g., trialmcp-authz, trialmcp-fhir).

version.description: SemVer version of the server implementation.

conformance_level.description: The conformance level this server satisfies (1–5).

tools.description: List of MCP tool names exposed by this server.

vendor_extensions.description: Optional vendor extension tool names (must use x-{vendor} prefix).

regulatory_certifications.description: Regulatory standards the server claims compliance with.

contact.description: Contact information for the server operator.

contact.organization: National Cancer Institute Trial Site A
